title: Profile
description: A named bundle of rules with per-rule mode / severity / parameter overrides. Design contract: docs/roadmap/rule-catalog-profiles.md. Profiles let an operator (or a fork) apply a curated subset of the catalog in one step, and extend chains let `strict` inherit from `recommended` from `baseline`. Fork overlays live under `rule-catalog/profiles-overrides/` and take precedence over upstream on any key they redeclare.

id.description: Stable slug used as the profile handle at composition-root config.

extends.description: Ordered list of profile ids this profile extends. Rules from later parents override rules from earlier ones; the profile's own `rules` list overrides its parents. Cycles are rejected at load time.

id.description: Rule id as it appears in `rule-catalog/catalog/`.

mode.description: Override the rule's default mode. Default = shadow (matches the standing safety invariant).

severity_override.description: Override the rule's own severity. A profile MAY escalate (medium -> high) but MAY NOT downgrade below the rule's authored floor - the loader enforces this.

parameters.description: Parameter values passed to the rule. Merged shallowly on top of the rule's authored defaults.

disabled.description: True hides the rule from the resolved profile. Useful for fork overlays that inherit `strict` but exempt one rule for a specific compliance requirement.

rules.description: Rules this profile activates. Combined with `extends` via the resolve algorithm documented in docs/roadmap/rule-catalog-profiles.md § Resolution.

parameters.description: Profile-wide parameter defaults. Applied to every rule that does NOT set the same key in its own `parameters`; a fork MAY use this to set an org-wide `tag.mandatory` list once.
